title: Commodore Amiga Chipset Stack
body:
# Commodore Amiga Chipset Stack

**Platform stack:** `amiga_chipset` · **Era:** 1985–1996 · **Vendor:** Commodore · **Count:** 4

Agnus, Denise, Paula — OCS/ECS/AGA chipset for Amiga 500/1200/4000 class machines.

## Stack doctrine

This page lists every combinatorics leaf stamped `platform_stack: amiga_chipset` plus companion dies emitted from `field-cpu-companion-seed.json`. Host and guest CPUs matching the stack's `match` rules receive `always_with` linkage at combinatorics build — no manual wiring.

## Manufacturing notes — companion dies

- **MOS Agnus** (MOS, 16-bit) — DMA + blitter address — Amiga north
- **MOS Paula** (MOS, 16-bit) — Audio + floppy + IRQ — Amiga south
- **MOS Denise** (MOS, 16-bit) — Display encoder — OCS/ECS

## Catalog ids

The `chip_ids` array holds all **4** entries for this platform stack, sorted alphabetically. Run `field-ironclad-chips-combinatorics.py combinatronic` for path percents and imprint renders.

*Stack: amiga_chipset · seed: data/field-cpu-companion-seed.json · citation: ironclad:chips:3*
